---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "Career summary, education, certifications, and selected service positions."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
toc-location: right
---

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/brandon-r-russell/){.btn .btn-primary} &nbsp; [GitHub](https://github.com/Brandon-Russell-1){.btn .btn-outline-secondary} &nbsp; [Email](mailto:brandon.r.russell.1@gmail.com){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

A current resume is available on request.

## Summary

Educator and cybersecurity practitioner with a Doctor of Education, Certified Master Instructor credential, and 3,000+ hours of classroom instruction in cybersecurity, communications, and aviation systems. CISSP, OSCP, and TS/SCI credentials plus 25+ years of operational experience support faculty contribution in cybersecurity and aviation programs.

## Education

**Doctor of Education, Educational Leadership** &nbsp; · &nbsp; 4.0 GPA &nbsp; · &nbsp; Aug 2022 \
Liberty University, Lynchburg, VA

**Master of Science, Information Technology** &nbsp; · &nbsp; 4.0 GPA &nbsp; · &nbsp; May 2019 \
University of Maryland Global Campus, Adelphi, MD

**Bachelor of Science, Computer Studies** &nbsp; · &nbsp; 3.8 GPA &nbsp; · &nbsp; Jun 2010 \
University of Maryland Global Campus, Adelphi, MD

## Clearance & certifications

- **TS/SCI Clearance**
- Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP)
- OffSec Certified Professional (OSCP)
- OffSec Wireless Professional (OSWP)
- CompTIA Security+ ce
- Certified Master Instructor
- Linear Algebra I & II Certificate: Linear Equations & Matrix Algebra
- FAA Part 107 Small Unmanned Aircraft Systems License
- Professional Manager Certification

## Skills

Curriculum Design & Development &nbsp;·&nbsp; Course & Assessment Design &nbsp;·&nbsp; Faculty Mentorship &nbsp;·&nbsp; Technical Instruction &nbsp;·&nbsp; Outcomes-Based Learning &nbsp;·&nbsp; Cybersecurity Operations & Strategy &nbsp;·&nbsp; Penetration Testing & Red Teaming &nbsp;·&nbsp; Software Development & Coding &nbsp;·&nbsp; Database Design & SQL &nbsp;·&nbsp; AI Security & Offensive AI

## Professional experience

### Teaching & curriculum

- Delivered **3,000 hours** of advanced classroom instruction in cybersecurity, communications, and aviation electrical systems, raising operational proficiency across U.S. Air Force wings and joint cyber forces.
- Supervised **21 instructors**, reviewed **153 courses** covering **3,000 learning objectives**, and mentored faculty in lesson design and assessment, graduating **1,398 students**.

### Cybersecurity & leadership

- Commanded **103 personnel** and directed C2 of **10K cyber forces** for **638K joint warfighters**; integrated kinetic and non-kinetic capabilities for unified global effects.
- Led a **51-person joint AF/Navy team** managing a **$54M cyber weapon system**, 80 Defense Information System Network circuits, 120 servers, a $9.5M radio network, and a $1.2M loudspeaker system.

### Cyber effects

- Led cyber operations countering a supply chain hack, hardening **289 servers across 81 missions** and blunting nation-state adversaries.
- Conducted cyber surveillance for **NORAD** and **Operation Noble Eagle**, protecting the 2020 elections, the top priority of the USCYBERCOM commander.

### Software development

- Built a SharePoint solution across **58 Air Force units**, enabling 1,000 personnel to execute 670 events nationwide and saving $500K in development costs.
- Developed database systems for aircraft operations, handling **10K sorties** and **$29M in assets** with SQL backends supporting trend analysis and continuity.

## Work history

**United States Air Force**

::: {.cv-table}

| Role | Location | Years |
|---|---|---|
| Cyber Master Instructor / Acting Director of Operations | Biloxi, MS | 2024 – Present |
| Recruiting Program Manager | San Antonio, TX | 2021 – 2024 |
| Senior Duty Officer, Cyber Operations | San Antonio, TX | 2020 – 2021 |
| Flight Commander, Cyber Operations | Charleston, SC | 2017 – 2020 |
| Supervisor & Master Instructor | Warner Robins, GA | 2011 – 2016 |
| Aircraft Electrical Tech, DB Developer, IA Officer | Spain & Azores | 2001 – 2011 |

:::

## Teaching

Teaching across cybersecurity, computer science, aviation, and aerospace topics. See [Teaching](teaching.qmd) for areas of expertise and current cohorts.

## Selected projects

See [Projects](projects.qmd) and [GitHub](https://github.com/Brandon-Russell-1).

## Writing & speaking

See [Writing](writing.qmd), [Publications](publications.qmd), [Medium](https://medium.com/@brandon.r.russell.1), and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Dr.BrandonRussell).

## References

Available on request.
